author: Deyan Todorov
name: Wider-Shallower QAT 4x768 1xH100
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 submission: 4-layer 768-dim architecture with GQA (12h/4kv), QK gain 2.5, gradient clipping 0.5, QAT via STE, Muon optimizer at lr=0.06. Beats equivalent-time baseline by 0.032+ bpb. Architecture validated across 51 experiments on A40 and H100.
architecture: 4 layers, 768 dim, 12 heads, 4 KV heads, MLP mult 2, tied embeddings
notes: Single-GPU result. Extrapolated 8xH100 performance at 20K steps: ~1.19 bpb (pending compute grant for official submission).
